action.reasoning: Observation: mae_60min improved to 3.8742 with current STGCN (hidden=160, blocks=5, MLP decoder, weighted loss). Val loss plateau ~0.321. Analysis: Need more expressive spatial modeling (adaptive graph structure) and better temporal receptive field (dilated convolutions) to capture non-local dependencies. Decision: Implement AdaptiveSTGCN with learnable adjacency, dilated temporal convolutions, exponential weighting, cosine schedule w/o restarts, and increased capacity (hidden=192, spatial=96). Train 80 epochs (~40min). Submit eval.
